Days-since-IPO alignment means each stock's day 0 = its own IPO date. Macro regime varies (e.g. AMZN 1997 vs META 2012); the "vs SPY" mode controls for the contemporaneous market.
1-minute OHLCV bars for the first 5 days of trading. Both deals had delayed opens, marked in the data.
Tickers
View
Window
Baseline
Overlays
Tape: continuous price with optional volume bars. Day boundaries marked. Day Overlay: each trading day plotted as its own line on a shared 9:30→16:00 axis (% from baseline) — lets you compare Day 1 shape vs Days 2-5. Volume Profile: horizontal histogram of cumulative volume by price level. Point of Control (POC) marked.
